method_summary: The study employs a granular decomposition of NIST CSF 2.0 functions into specific tasks, linking essential AI agent properties (autonomy, adaptive learning, real-time responsiveness) to subcategory security requirements, and outlines graduated levels of autonomy (assisted, augmented, fully autonomous).
key_innovation: A unified cybersecurity AI agent selection and decision support framework that links AI agent properties to NIST CSF 2.0 subcategories and provides graduated autonomy levels for different organizational maturity stages.
title: A cybersecurity AI agent selection and decision support framework
